sql_array: CREATE TABLE http_headers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, header_name VARCHAR(255), header_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO http_headers (id, header_name, header_value) VALUES (1, 'Content-Type', 'text/html');
UPDATE http_headers SET header_value = 'application/json' WHERE header_name = 'Content-Type';
SELECT * FROM http_headers WHERE header_value LIKE '%html%';
